pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.4.12 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 1.5.x does not support Java 21; the project will fail to compile or run on JDK 21 without upgrading to a compatible Spring Boot 3.x version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 1.8 to 21 to align with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Maven compiler plugin will default to Java 8 source/target levels if not specified, causing compilation errors or missing features when building with JDK 21.

src/main/java/com/springmvc/springmongod.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Data `findOne` with `findById` returning `Optional` to comply with Spring Data Commons 2.x API changes.
src/main/java/com/springmvc/springmongod.why_exists: Compile error: `findOne` method does not exist in `CrudRepository`/`MongoRepository` in newer Spring Data versions; it was replaced by `findById`.

src/main/java/com/springmvc/springmongod.general_idea: Remove overridden findOne method which is no longer needed or supported in the same way.
src/main/java/com/springmvc/springmongod.why_exists: findOne was deprecated in Spring Data Commons 2.0 and removed in later versions; MongoRepository provides findById instead.

src/test/java/com/springmvc/springmongod.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 imports and annotations with JUnit 5 equivalents to align with modern testing standards.
src/test/java/com/springmvc/springmongod.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes (org.junit.Test, org.junit.runner.RunWith) are not part of the JUnit 5 API; using them with JUnit 5 dependencies or in a JUnit 5 context causes compilation errors or runtime failures if the JUnit 4 engine is not explicitly included.
